ollama_format.description: Structured smoke output schema for one text response.
ollama_format.title: StructuredSmokeText

structured_output_schema.description: Structured smoke output schema for one text response.
structured_output_schema.title: StructuredSmokeText

parsed_response.response_text: The data reveals consistent fluctuations in the number of households adhering to the E-RO strategy across 30 timesteps. Initially, counts hover between 20-32 households in most timesteps, stabilizing near a median of 20 households in later periods (e.g., timesteps 20-29). Notable deviations include peaks up to 39 households at specific thresholds (e.g., timesteps 23-25), followed by recovery to baseline levels. The pattern suggests E-RO agents demonstrate resilience to climatic variability (rain-mean=200, rain-std=100) through ecological sensitivity, maintaining moderate adherence despite environmental pressures. However, the absence of social learning enhancements (homog-behav-types=True disables E-LBD/SL1 adoption) limits population-level adaptation, aligning with E-RO's baseline ecological focus in resource-managed systems under controlled behavioral homogeneity.
